The user wants me to identify all time segments where English is spoken in the video.

1.  **Analyze the video and transcript:**
    *   **00:00 - 00:05:** SPEAKER_00 (English): "The arena sounds ready for it. The Verizon post-game interview. The crowd wants it. Guma with Lore and G-sen."
    *   **00:12 - 00:28:** SPEAKER_01 (French): "Paris, un tonnerre d'acclamations..."
    *   **00:28 - 00:41:** SPEAKER_01 (French): "Genji les a battus dix fois d'affilée..."
    *   **00:41 - 00:51:** SPEAKER_01 (English): "Gen.G beat you guys 10 times before you finally defeated them today. Tell me about it. What made it special? What made today different?"
    *   **00:51 - 01:00:** SPEAKER_02 (Korean): "젠지가 사실은 오늘 경기 전까지..."
    *   **01:00 - 01:06:** SPEAKER_03 (Korean): "어... 이곳이 월주이기 때문입니다."
    *   **01:06 - 01:10:** SPEAKER_02 (English): "because this is Worlds."
    *   **01:10 - 01:25:** SPEAKER_01 (French): "C'est les Worlds, et on sait que pendant les Worlds..."
    *   **01:25 - 01:31:** SPEAKER_01 (English): "Do you feel anything different when you play on the whole stage that makes you pop off the way you guys did so far?"
    *   **01:31 - 01:42:** SPEAKER_02 (Korean): "말씀하신 것처럼 T1은 정말 월즈 무대만 오면..."
    *   **01:42 - 01:56:** SPEAKER_03 (Korean): "개인적으로는 좀 그런 느낌이 생기는 것 같고..."
    *   **01:56 - 02:02:** SPEAKER_01 (English): "Personally, yes, somehow I get to focus up even more and also I kind of get into the flow state."
    *   **02:02 - 02:45:** SPEAKER_01 (French): "Ils arrivent à vraiment se mettre dans le bon mood..."
    *   **02:45 - 03:00:** SPEAKER_02 (Korean): "작년 월즈에서도 결승 진출을 확정 지으시고..."
    *   **03:00 - 03:09:** SPEAKER_03 (Korean): "저희가 지금 메타 이해도가 가장 뛰어나다고 생각하고..."
    *   **03:09 - 03:14:** SPEAKER_02 (English): "I can't say for... sure that we... Thank you. best meta read so far, and we are dictating still." (Note: SPEAKER_00 also speaks briefly here in English "Thank you.")
    *   **03:14 - 03:28:** SPEAKER_01 (French): "Ils ont la meilleure vision de la méta..."
    *   **03:28 - 03:56:** SPEAKER_01 (French): "Et je le disais au début de cette interview..."
    *   **03:56 - 04:04:** SPEAKER_02 (Korean): "세 번 연속 월즈 결승 무대에 진출하셨고요..."
    *   **04:04 - 04:21:** SPEAKER_03 (Korean): "월즈 결승이라는 게 참 프로게이머들에게 꿈의 무대인데..."
    *   **04:21 - 04:37:** SPEAKER_02 (English): "World finals is the dream stage for every professional player. I am very grateful that we pulled it off together on the same roster for three years in a row and I hope we can have a good outcome this summer as well."
    *   **04:37 - 05:05:** SPEAKER_01 (French): "Arriver en finale de championnat du monde c'est le rêve ultime..."
    *   **05:05 - 05:18:** SPEAKER_01 (French): "En interview Vambine hier, il les attendait..."
    *   **05:18 - 05:20:** SPEAKER_01 (English): "On va voir ce que Goma Yushi peut en penser." (Wait, this is French in the transcript but the speaker says "Let's see what Gumayusi has to say" in English? No, looking at the transcript, it says "On va voir ce que Goma Yushi peut en penser." which is French. But then immediately after at 05:20, she switches to English.)
    *   **05:20 - 05:34:** SPEAKER_01 (English): "When I had Bin for interview yesterday, he said that he wants to face off against you guys. He wants to defeat the world champion and bring pride to the LPL again. Do you have any message for Bin and for BLG, your opponents, for next week?"
    *   **05:34 - 05:49:** SPEAKER_02 (Korean): "어제 이제 빈 선수가 인터뷰에서 T1을 결승해서 만나고 싶다..."
    *   **05:49 - 05:58:** SPEAKER_03 (Korean): "제가 작년에 했던 말을 잊지 말아야 될 겁니다"
    *   **05:58 - 06:01:** SPEAKER_00 (English): "You better not forget what I told you last year."
    *   **06:01 - 06:13:** SPEAKER_01 (French): "N'oublie surtout pas ce que je t'ai dit l'an dernier. Voilà le message."
    *   **06:13 - 06:34:** SPEAKER_01 (French): "Du coup Paris pour conclure."
    *   **06:34 - 07:07:** SPEAKER_01 (English): "I want to say thank you to all the fans, thank you to all the teams but also the fans wanted to say thank you for everything you brought them they were so hopeful and really really looking forward to seeing you. So we have a gift."
    *   **07:07 - 07:18:** SPEAKER_01 (English): "France has a gift for you. I present you... Normal-sized croissant."
    *   **07:18 - 07:26:** SPEAKER_02 (Korean): "프랑스 팬분들이 감사의 마음을 담아 평범한 사이즈 크로와상을 준비해봤습니다. 먹고 후기 한번 들려주시죠."
    *   **07:26 - 07:32:** SPEAKER_01 (English): "Do you like it?"
    *   **07:32 - 07:37:** SPEAKER_03 (Korean): (Eating)
    *   **07:37 - 07:39:** SPEAKER_03 (English): "It's good."
    *   **07:39 - 07:45:** SPEAKER_01 (French): "Effectivement, we received battles for us here on the Paris stage." (Mixed, but starts with French).
    *   **07:45 - 07:54:** SPEAKER_01 (English): "BLG vs T1 will be your 2024 World Finals. Paris, last time for T1 and Gouma!"
